local_results.title: Luxe Massage & Spa ~ Portland
local_results.description: Spa featuring relaxation and therapeutic massages, including couples sessions, hot stones, and cupping.
local_results.user_review: "50 min massage and I felt like a new man with a new hope for life!"

local_results.title: Kanani Pearl Spa
local_results.description: Relaxed day spa for facials & massage. Serene setting for facials, Hawaiian & Swedish massage, body treatments & other spa services.
local_results.user_review: "Every penny is worth the quality of massage here."

local_results.title: Spa Sassé
local_results.user_review: "The massage was skillful and relaxing and she has a soothing presence."

local_results.title: Mio Zen Massage and SPA
local_results.user_review: "Deep tissue massage felt amazing and the prices are reasonable :)"

local_results.title: The Dragontree Holistic Day Spa
local_results.description: Spa offering a variety of massages plus saunas, showers, and foot soaks.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, good massage, nice ambiance, good amenities and sauna."

local_results.title: Zama Massage Therapeutic Spa
local_results.description: Spa offering a range of massages, facial treatments and foot treatments, plus salt-cave therapy.
local_results.user_review: "We left feeling very relaxed, especially after our wonderful massage."

local_results.title: Rose City Remedy Massage & Spa
local_results.address: 819 SE Morrison St Ste 314, Portland, OR 97214
local_results.user_review: "I left feeling so refreshed, relaxed, and noticeably lighter."

local_results.title: Knot Springs
local_results.description: Upscale fitness studio & day spa. High-end health club with yoga, Pilates, TRX & HIIT classes as well as a pool/sauna area & massage.
local_results.user_review: "I left feeling rejuvenated, refreshed, and completely pampered."

local_results.title: Blooming Moon Wellness Spa
local_results.description: Eco-friendly day spa offering massages, body scrubs, facials, and pedicures.
local_results.user_review: "We came in for massages and they were incredible - very personalized."

local_results.title: Xenana Spa and Wellness
local_results.user_review: "75 min massage is perfect and you leave in a state of pure zen."

local_results.title: Luna Wellness Spa
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, clean office and great massages."

local_results.title: The NOW Massage Portland Pearl District
local_results.user_review: "Exiting Now Massage, I felt a profound sense of relaxation and rejuvenation."

local_results.title: KIVA SPA
local_results.description: Mellow cafe brewing lots of teas. Relaxing cafe attached to a spa offers a broad variety of teas plus coffee, smoothies & light bites.
local_results.user_review: "The infrared sauna and massage were great and left me so relaxed."

local_results.title: Yomassage Social Spa
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful owners, a beautiful space, and a lovely massage therapist."

local_results.title: The Wine Spa
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, amazing massage, and luxurious wine bath."

local_results.title: The Head Spa
local_results.user_review: "The massage really cleared my mind, and I felt super calm."

local_results.title: Common Ground Wellness Cooperative
local_results.user_review: "Best massage I’ve had in years, and I left feeling incredible."

local_results.title: Ya Ya Massage & Spa
local_results.description: Foot massage parlor offering 30-minute, 60-minute, and 90-minute sessions, with advance booking or walk-in options.
local_results.user_review: "After I left I could turn my neck again and I feel just so relaxed."

local_results.title: Gentle Cloud Spa
local_results.user_review: "Incredible massage in a beautiful, clean, relaxing environment."

local_results.title: The NOW Massage Portland Hawthorne
local_results.description: Massage spa offering custom enhancements such as cupping and deep-tissue work.
